references.label: @FENSHOU_IDENTITY_REF
references.duty: Fenshou identity only; preserve black-red armored male fighter identity, face, hair, costume language, and body type; do not dictate pose, camera, corridor geometry, or action mechanics.

references.label: @SHUANGJI_IDENTITY_REF
references.duty: Shuangji highest-priority identity only; preserve blue-white and silver female fighter identity, face, hair, body type, and costume language; do not let video-derived frames override identity.

references.label: @V004_CORRIDOR_SCENE_REF
references.duty: Scene/world only; preserve rainy ancient temple world, wet stone, wooden architecture material language, and cold rain mood; do not define character identity or action mechanics.

references.label: @SPLIT02_START_ANCHOR_CUT_B_START_03
references.duty: Start continuity and composition anchor only; preserve incoming V004 corridor-combat pressure, spacing, and direction; do not use as identity reference.

references.label: @SPLIT02_RETURN_ANCHOR_CUT_C_RETURN_01
references.duty: Return continuity and composition anchor only; preserve exit compatibility back into close corridor combat; do not use as identity reference.

fallback_reference_strategy.trigger: If K160 judges the five-reference package overloaded or likely to confuse identity, scene, and continuity duties.
fallback_reference_strategy.action: Remove @SPLIT02_RETURN_ANCHOR_CUT_C_RETURN_01 from generation image refs and keep it as review/planning reference only.
